basic_details.job_title: Chennai District Para Legal Volunteers Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Chennai District Para Legal Volunteers Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. Has been announced through the Chennai District Para Legal Volunteers Recruitment 2026. Candidates aged between 25 to 65 years who have completed 12th pass, with a preference for graduates in Social Work or Psychology, are eligible to apply for these Para Legal Volunteers vacancies. The offline application process for Chennai District Para Legal Volunteers Recruitment 2026 will remain open until 25-05-2026. Candidates can download the official notification PDF and apply offline through the direc

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 25 years Maximum Age: 65 years

qualification.education_qualification: Preference for graduates in Social Work or Psychology.
qualification.details: Para Legal Volunteers: 12th pass (Plus Two) Preference for graduates in Social Work or Psychology

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 1000/- per visit, maximum Rs. 5000/- per case
salary_details.details: Rs. 1000/- per visit Maximum Rs. 5000/- per case

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Chennai District Para Legal Volunteers Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: http://Chennai.dcourts.gov.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 25-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Chennai District Para Legal Volunteers Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the Para Legal Volunteers posts in Chennai District is 25th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum age requirement for Para Legal Volunteers?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for applying as a Para Legal Volunteer in Chennai District is 25 years. Candidates must meet this age criterion to be eligible for the position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for Para Legal Volunteers is 65 years. This allows experienced individuals and retired government employees to apply and contribute their expertise.

faq.question: Q4. What is the qualification required for Para Legal Volunteers?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed the 12th standard (Plus Two). Preference will be given to graduates in Social Work or Psychology. Other service-minded individuals can also apply.

faq.question: Q5. How will the selection be done for Para Legal Volunteers?
faq.answer: The selection process for Para Legal Volunteers involves two main stages: the submission of your application and a subsequent interview. Candidates need to perform well in both to be considered.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for Para Legal Volunteers?
faq.answer: Para Legal Volunteers will receive Rs. 1000/- per visit. The maximum remuneration per case is capped at Rs. 5000/-. This is a stipend-based role.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any specific application fee for the Para Legal Volunteers recruitment. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any updates.

faq.question: Q8. Can retired government employees apply for this post?
faq.answer: Yes, retired government employees are eligible to apply for the Para Legal Volunteers position, provided they meet the age and other general eligibility criteria mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required with the application form?
faq.answer: You need to submit copies of your educational certificates, proof of residence, and a self-introduction note along with your application form. Ensure all are self-attested.

faq.question: Q10. How should I submit my application?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted in person or by registered post to the address specified in the official notification. Make sure to send it before the closing date.
